emailTemplates.name: New Employee Onboarding Welcome
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome to Al-Mansoori - Set Up Your HR Portal Account
emailTemplates.subjectAr: مرحباً بك في شركة المنصوري - تفعيل حسابك في بوابة الموارد البشرية

emailTemplates.name: Password Recovery Link
emailTemplates.subject: Reset your Al-Mansoori HR Portal Password
emailTemplates.subjectAr: إعادة تعيين كلمة المرور - بوابة الموارد البشرية لشركة المنصوري
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{EmployeeName}},

We received a request to reset the password for your HR Portal account. Use the link below to set a new password:
{{ResetLink}}

This recovery link is temporary and will expire in 30 minutes. If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email or contact the HR IT Security team immediately.

Best regards,
{{CompanyName}} Security Team

emailTemplates.name: Multi-Factor OTP Verification
emailTemplates.subject: Verification Code (MFA) - GCC HR Portal
emailTemplates.subjectAr: رمز التحقق الثنائي (MFA) - بوابة الموارد البشرية
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{EmployeeName}},

Your temporary Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) security code is:

{{OTPCode}}

This code is confidential and is valid for 5 minutes. Never share this code with anyone, including HR support staff.

Best regards,
{{CompanyName}} Identity Protection

emailTemplates.name: Leave Request Status Update
emailTemplates.subject: Leave Request Approved - {{LeaveType}}
emailTemplates.body:
Dear {{EmployeeName}},

Your leave request for {{LeaveType}} starting on {{StartDate}} and ending on {{EndDate}} has been officially approved. All downstream workflow logs have been locked.

Thank you,
{{CompanyName}} HR
emailTemplates.bodyAr:
عزيزي {{EmployeeName}}،

تمت الموافقة رسمياً على طلب الإجازة الخاص بك ({{LeaveType}}) للفترة من {{StartDate}} إلى {{EndDate}}. تم حفظ واعتماد سجلات الموافقة.

شكراً لك،
إدارة الموارد البشرية - {{CompanyName}}

emailQueue.subject: Welcome to Al-Mansoori - Set Up Your HR Portal Account
emailQueue.message:
Dear Ayman Sidahmed,

Welcome to Al-Mansoori! We are thrilled to have you join our team as Director in the Executive Management department.

Your HR Portal employee account has been created. Here are your temporary credentials:
- Username: ayman
- Temporary Password: AlMansoori@3739

Please activate your account and change your temporary password upon your first login.

Best regards,
Al-Mansoori HR Department
